title: Downscaled+Reimagined gust
description: Changes wind particle to 16x instead of 32x resolution (optional)
body:
**Vanilla 32x particles look kinda bad and colorless, aren't they? If you think so, check my variants ^^**

# Here are vanilla variant vs mine:
> I used wind charge colors, added little dust stars and removed flash at the beginning

![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156a7722f38cc9933739680d9d62bb9cd681ad15.gif)![vs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d284e5e99a5bc6ba6de8deb62b0e2e5385c708.png)![32](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72cfa9f7c6ef3ebdc8056f93a0060a48aeb5f641.gif)![16](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7177ff9584caccef11076f386230327159cb746.gif)
### [Vanilla] / [My 32x] / [My 16x] 
 
- ### _! Through the Modrinth launcher you can only download 16x variant, go to the modrinth website to get the 32x style !_
 

**Check out my other project! (clickable):**

[![www](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4100f21e6ea3e702a6868b9d3a234241c443ab02.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brutal-mace)
